parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.script, model_id: "eleven_turbo_v2", voice_settings: { stability: 0.5, similarity_boost: 0.8, style: 0.3, use_speaker_boost: true } }) }}

nodes.name: ElevenLabs — Generate Voiceover
nodes.notes: Female voice: 21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM (Rachel - warm, educational). Male voice: AZnzlk1XvdvUeBnXmlld (Adam - professional, workout content). API key hardcoded.

nodes.name: Upload Audio to Supabase Storage
nodes.notes: Uploads ElevenLabs MP3 to Supabase Storage via REST API (no credential node needed). Replace YOUR_SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID and YOUR_SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY.

nodes.name: Assemble Video (Railway ffmpeg)
nodes.notes: Calls Supabase assemble-video Edge Function. Pexels fetches stock footage, FFmpeg combines with ElevenLabs audio + captions. Returns public video URL. Timeout: 2 minutes.

nodes.name: Upload-Post — Post Video
nodes.notes: Posts video to each platform via Upload-Post API. API key hardcoded. Runs once per platform (tiktok, instagram, youtube, facebook) due to split above.

nodes.name: Upload-Post — Post Text
nodes.notes: Posts text content to Pinterest and LinkedIn. No video needed for these platforms.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "YFIT content generated and posted to all platforms", "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}" }

nodes.name: Manual Test Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Test workflow' to run a test. Feeds sample data into the pipeline.

nodes.name: Test Data (Sample Payload)
nodes.notes: Edit the content_items here to test different content angles.

nodes.name: Dry Run Logger
nodes.notes: Shows a summary of what would have been posted. Check the Output tab to see the full report.

nodes.name: Is Dry Run?
nodes.notes: Routes to Dry Run Logger if dry_run=true, otherwise proceeds to actual posting

nodes.name: Is Dry Run? (Text)
nodes.notes: Routes text posts to Dry Run Logger if dry_run=true

nodes.name: Dry Run Logger (Text)
nodes.notes: Shows what text posts (LinkedIn, Pinterest) would have been sent

nodes.name: Rename Binary to data
nodes.notes: Renames the ElevenLabs audio binary field to 'data' so the Upload node can find it
